languages.text: Всего один экспонат на огромном помосте. Кажется, это место лишь готовит пространство для будущих трофеев.
Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.
languages.original_text: Всего один экспонат на огромном помосте. Кажется, это место лишь готовит пространство для будущих трофеев.

traits.locale_text: Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.
Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.
Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.

languages.text: 巨大的基座上只摆着一件展品，看来这片空间是专门留给未来的战利品的。
languages.original_text: Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.

traits.locale_text: 巨大的基座上只摆着一件展品，看来这片空间是专门留给未来的战利品的。

languages.text: Solo hay una exposición en un pedestal enorme. Parece que el espacio está reservado para trofeos futuros.
languages.original_text: Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.

traits.locale_text: Solo hay una exposición en un pedestal enorme. Parece que el espacio está reservado para trofeos futuros.

languages.text: Une unique pièce, sur un piédestal immense. Il semble que cet espace soit destiné à accueillir de futurs trophées.
languages.original_text: Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.

traits.locale_text: Une unique pièce, sur un piédestal immense. Il semble que cet espace soit destiné à accueillir de futurs trophées.

languages.text: Devasa bir platformda sadece tek bir sergi var. Görünüşe göre bu alan, gelecek ganimetler için ayrılmış.
languages.original_text: Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.

traits.locale_text: Devasa bir platformda sadece tek bir sergi var. Görünüşe göre bu alan, gelecek ganimetler için ayrılmış.

languages.text: Nur ein Exponat auf einem riesigen Podium. Dieser Platz scheint zukünftigen Trophäen vorbehalten zu sein.
languages.original_text: Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.

traits.locale_text: Nur ein Exponat auf einem riesigen Podium. Dieser Platz scheint zukünftigen Trophäen vorbehalten zu sein.

languages.text: 巨大な壇上に展示されたのは、たった1つのトロフィー。このスペースは、将来のトロフィーのために空けておくようだ。
languages.original_text: Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.

traits.locale_text: 巨大な壇上に展示されたのは、たった1つのトロフィー。このスペースは、将来のトロフィーのために空けておくようだ。
